scripts.build:haxe:js: node tools/haxe.mjs -cp src -cp generated -cp tests/haxe --main JsEntry --js build/haxe-js/flight.cjs -D js-es=6 --macro "include('flighthq')" --macro "addGlobalMetadata('flighthq', '@:expose')"
scripts.check: npm run generate:check && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run api:check
scripts.ci: npm run build && npm run check && npm run test && npm run package
scripts.clean: node -e "for (const path of ['dist', 'build', 'coverage']) require('fs').rmSync(path, { force: true, recursive: true })"
scripts.fix: npm run lint:fix && npm run format
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:haxe:all && npm run test:portable && npm run test:upstream
scripts.test:haxe:all: node tools/haxe.mjs -cp src -cp generated -cp tests/haxe --main CoreSmoke --interp --macro "include('flighthq')"
scripts.test:haxe:core: node tools/haxe.mjs -cp src -cp generated -cp tests/haxe --main CoreSmoke --interp
scripts.test:upstream:math: npm run build:haxe:js && node tools/test-upstream.mjs --package math
